rules.rule: Keep state as local as possible. Elevate only when siblings genuinely share it.
Do not duplicate server data into multiple independent component states.
Use URL state for route-significant, shareable, or bookmarkable state.
Use component state for local UI state with no meaning outside the component.
Use application-level state only for genuinely cross-cutting concerns.
Global state must not be used to avoid designing props.
State transitions with business meaning must be handled through services, not directly in state setters.
